vocab.example: There's a stunning architectural marvel just a few blocks away that dominates the local skyline.

vocab.meaning: trải dài khắp/nằm rải rác trên
vocab.example: High-rise apartments sprawl across the district, reflecting the rapid urbanization of the area.

vocab.meaning: làm cản trở/che khuất tầm nhìn
vocab.example: Unfortunately, several new skyscrapers have recently been built that obstruct the view of the mountains.

vocab.meaning: khu rừng bê tông (nơi có quá nhiều tòa nhà cao tầng)
vocab.example: Living in the city center feels like being in a concrete jungle with towering structures at every turn.

vocab.meaning: lối sống trong khu vực dân cư đông đúc (thường là chung cư cao tầng)
vocab.example: The proliferation of tall buildings near my home is a clear sign of the trend toward high-density living.

vocab.meaning: làm cho những thứ xung quanh trở nên nhỏ bé
vocab.example: The new 50-story commercial tower completely dwarfs the traditional low-rise houses in my neighborhood.

vocab.meaning: các cơ sở vật chất hiện đại bậc nhất
vocab.example: The skyscrapers surrounding my apartment complex house state-of-the-art facilities like rooftop gyms and infinity pools.

vocab.meaning: hình bóng/đường nét của thành phố trên nền trời
vocab.example: I enjoy watching the sunset when the skyline silhouette becomes visible from my balcony.

vocab.meaning: mặt tiền bao phủ bằng kính
vocab.example: The tall buildings in this area are mostly modern office blocks with sleek, glass-clad facades.
My neighborhood has transformed into a major residential hub, characterized by a cluster of high-rise condominiums.
